label: Gianfranco Ferré couture
present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
working_process: Hand-sewn silk panels with structured boning
description: Evening gown with structured ivory silk bodice and full black taffeta skirt. Gold metallic embroidery at the neckline with hand-applied Swarovski crystals along the waistline.
remark: A masterful interplay of volume and restraint. The contrast between the rigid bodice and the fluid skirt exemplifies Ferré's architectural approach to couture.
